framing: Marketing manager returning after 3-year career break (childcare)

jd.title: Marketing Manager — Growth

requirements.text: 5+ years of B2B marketing experience with focus on growth or demand generation
Experience managing paid acquisition channels (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Meta)
Experience with marketing automation platforms (HubSpot, Marketo, or Pardot)
Data-driven approach with experience in marketing analytics and attribution modeling
Content marketing strategy experience (blog, webinars, whitepapers)
Experience with SEO and organic growth strategies
MBA or degree in Marketing, Business, or related field
Experience in SaaS or technology industry

responsibilities: Develop and execute multi-channel growth marketing strategy to drive qualified leads
Manage $1.2M annual paid acquisition budget across Google, LinkedIn, and Meta platforms
Build and optimize lead nurture campaigns using marketing automation
Analyze campaign performance and provide actionable insights to leadership
Collaborate with sales team on lead scoring, handoff processes, and pipeline reporting
Manage team of 2 marketing coordinators and 1 content specialist

expected_output.summary: B2B Growth Marketing leader with 6 years of SaaS marketing experience at Zendesk and Intercom, returning from a 3-year career break. Managed $800K annual paid acquisition budget generating 2,500+ qualified leads per quarter. Expert in HubSpot marketing automation, Google Ads, and LinkedIn Ads with strong attribution modeling skills. Previously managed team of 4 across demand generation and content marketing.

experience.title: Senior Growth Marketing Manager
bullets: Managed $800K annual paid acquisition budget across Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, and Meta, generating 2,500+ MQLs per quarter
Built 15 automated lead nurture campaigns in HubSpot, improving MQL-to-SQL conversion rate by 28%
Led team of 4 (2 marketing coordinators, 1 content specialist, 1 paid media contractor)
Developed attribution modeling framework connecting marketing spend to pipeline revenue ($4.2M influenced ARR)
Launched monthly webinar program (20 webinars over tenure) averaging 350 registrants per session

experience.title: Growth Marketing Specialist
bullets: Executed demand generation campaigns for mid-market segment across paid search, email, and content channels
Managed HubSpot marketing automation including email workflows, landing pages, and lead scoring
Optimized Google Ads campaigns reducing cost-per-lead by 35% while maintaining lead volume
Collaborated with sales on lead handoff process and monthly pipeline review meetings

experience.title: Primary Caregiver
bullets: Maintained industry knowledge through HubSpot Academy certifications and marketing community involvement
Completed Google Analytics 4 certification and HubSpot Marketing Software certification during break
Freelanced on 3 small marketing projects (SEO audit, email campaign, landing page design)

growth_marketing: paid acquisition (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, Meta)

jd_requirements: 5+ years B2B marketing growth demand generation
paid acquisition Google Ads LinkedIn Meta
deliberate_flaws: No Marketo or Pardot experience (only HubSpot)
Budget $800K vs required $500K+ (meets threshold but JD manages $1.2M)
SEO skills are basic, not strategic
Marketing landscape changed significantly during break (GA4, cookie deprecation, AI content)

provenance.notes: Synthetic persona and JD. JD style modeled from real Greenhouse/Lever postings. Expected output and cloud_skills are AI-generated. 4/8 scorecard checks (jd_coverage, no_fabrication, metrics_preserved, no_fabricated_skills) evaluate AI vs AI reference. 4/8 checks (factual_preservation, word_count, ats_structure, action_verbs) are structurally valid regardless.
